vibe: Energetic, cutting-edge, magical, fast. A highly immersive tech tool aesthetic.

rules.headings: Tight letter spacing (tracking-tight), never default to standard bold (use font-light or font-black). Maximum text size text-6xl. Do NOT use Inter.

layout_spacing.grid_strategy: The Control Room Grid (For Code/Dashboard) & Bento Grid (For Marketing/Landing)
rules: Generous spacing: use p-8 or p-12 instead of p-4 where possible.
Asymmetry in marketing sections, strict density in code generator dashboard.
Grid children must be direct children. Override default stretch with align-items: start.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

components.buttons: Flat solid background with sharp inner contrast. Glow effect on hover. Transition transform and opacity.
components.inputs: Glassmorphism style with 1px border. Focus state must have high contrast border.
components.cards: Glassmorphism for floating elements (bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10). Solid flat cards for code display.
components.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog, heavily customized with glassmorphism.

rules: Hover states for all interactive elements.

images.description: Creative abstract art featuring vibrant fluid lines and colors on a dark background. Use as a background layer with low opacity (bg-black/70 overlay) to create glowing 'The Kinetic Texture'.
Black flat screen computer monitor. Use inside a feature bento card to represent code output.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a vibrant dark mode landing page and code generation dashboard using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI components.
Apply the '7 (Electric & Neon)' archetype with a base color of #05050A. Never use pure #000000. Use neon cyan (#00E5FF) and hot pink (#FF007F) for vibrant accents and gradients.
Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'JetBrains Mono' for body text and code blocks.
The Hero section should contain the file upload system (image + text) housed inside a glassmorphism bento card.
The 'Generated Code Display' and 'Interactive Demo Interface' should be presented in a control-room style grid using pure HTML/Tailwind for layout structure.
Incorporate the 'Project Proto Documentation' as a sleek side-panel or tabbed view using Shadcn Tabs.
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs) and key informational areas MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.
Ensure high contrast on interactive states (hover/focus).
